zh.Knightley, Staffordshire, England, Unite: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾麗莉
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert I de Knightley Kt於1129年出生在英國斯塔福爾麗莉時，他的父親Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley25歲，母親Mrs Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley20歲。他和Saira de Chitteleia至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1199年在他的家鄉享年71歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾格諾薩爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert I de Knightley Kt于1129年出生在英国斯塔福爾麗莉时，他的父亲Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley25岁，母亲Mrs Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley20岁。他和Saira de Chitteleia至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于大约1199年在他的家乡享年71岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾格諾薩爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Knightley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Knightly
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of Knightley, a habitational name from Knightley in Gnosall (Staffordshire). The placename derives from Old English cniht ‘knight, young man, retainer’ (genitive plural cnihta) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This is the usual spelling of the name in Ireland, where it has been establishes since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert I de Knightley Kt was born in 1129, in Knightley, Staffordshire, England, his father, Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley, was 25 and his mother, Mrs Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley, was 20. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Saira de Chitteleia. He died about 1199, in his hometown, at the age of 71, and was buried in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert I de Knightley Kt est né en 1129, à Knightley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mrs Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Saira de Chitteleia. Il est décédé environ 1199, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Gnosall, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert I de Knightley Kt 1129 in Knightley, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley 25 und seine Mutter Mrs Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley 20. Er hatte mit Saira de Chitteleia mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1199 im Alter von 71 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert I de Knightley Kt è nato il nel 1129 nel Knightley, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Saira de Chitteleia. Morì circa 1199, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Gnosall, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert I de Knightley Ktが1129年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアナイトリーで生まれた時，父Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightleyは25歳，母Mrs Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightleyは20歳であった。彼はSaira de Chitteleiaとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1199年に故郷で71歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアグノサルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert I de Knightley Kt(이)가 1129년 영국 스태퍼드실르 나이틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Saira de Chitteleia(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1199년 그의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 뇰사에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert I de Knightley Kt nasceu em 1129, em Knightley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Saira de Chitteleia. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1199, em sua cidade natal, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert I de Knightley Kt родился в 1129 г. в местности нагтли, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley, 20. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Saira de Chitteleia. Он умер около 1199 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности гносалл, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert I de Knightley Kt nació en 1129, en Knightley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mrs Nicholas Maucovenant de Knightley, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Saira de Chitteleia. Murió aproximadamente 1199, en su pueblo, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
